infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Luvstor accesses your photo library so you can share images in chat.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Luvstor uses the microphone so you can record and send voice messages.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Luvstor uses the camera so you can take and share photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Luvstor uses your location to show you nearby matches.
